title: Greek Baklava
description: A traditional Greek pastry made with layers of phyllo, nuts, and honey.
instructions: Thaw phyllo according to package instructions.
Layer 4 sheets of phyllo in a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Mix nuts, honey, yogurt, vanilla, cinnamon, cloves, and salt in a bowl.
Spread the nut mixture evenly over the phyllo.
Layer another 4 sheets of phyllo on top.
Brush melted butter over the top layer of phyllo.
Repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of phyllo on top.
Cut the baklava into diamond shapes and bake for 45-50 minutes.
Let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
